site.name: Dimensions Edge
site.tagline: 25 years of low current and ICT excellence in Saudi Arabia

home.heroSubtitle: Networking, AV, CCTV, access control, fire and building automation — designed, installed, and supported across the Kingdom.
home.servicesSubtitle: From the cabling under your floor to the screens on your wall, we engineer every layer in-house.
home.whyTitle: Engineering you can rely on long after handover.
home.whyBody: We design, install, and maintain every system we deliver. No subcontractors to blame, no finger-pointing when something goes wrong — just one team that owns the outcome from brief to maintenance contract.

why.engineeredBody: Every project starts with proper design documentation — load schedules, single-line diagrams, and system layouts before a single cable is pulled.
why.ownedBody: Design, installation, commissioning, and maintenance under one contract. One point of contact for the life of the system.
why.documentedBody: Certification reports, as-built drawings, and commissioning records handed over before the final invoice.
why.responsiveBody: Maintenance contracts with committed response times. We answer when critical systems need attention — including weekends.

home.projectsTitle: Projects we are proud to talk about
home.ctaHeading: Ready to discuss your next project?
home.ctaBody: Send us the brief and we will respond within one business day with a design proposal and budget estimate.

about.title: A quarter century engineering the systems behind Saudi business.
about.subtitle: Founded in 2005, we have grown into one of the Kingdom's most relied-upon low-current and ICT integrators.
about.heroImageAlt: Dimensions Edge engineering team at work
about.whoP1: Dimensions Edge is a Saudi-based systems integrator specialising in low-current and ICT infrastructure. For over 20 years, we have designed, installed, and maintained the technology layers that keep the Kingdom's most demanding buildings running — from government ministries and financial institutions to hospitals, hotels, and large-scale developments.
about.whoP2: We were founded on a simple conviction: that the gap between specification and delivery should not exist. Too many projects were handed over with punch lists, finger-pointing between subcontractors, and systems that worked in the demo but not in the building. We set out to change that — and we have built every process and every team around that commitment.
about.whoP3: Today, Dimensions Edge is a trusted partner of some of the most recognised names in Saudi Arabia. We bring the same engineering discipline to a 10-room office fitout as we do to a national infrastructure rollout. Our clients come back because the systems hold, the documentation is clean, and the phone is answered.
about.storyP1: Dimensions Edge was founded with a simple thesis: buildings in the region were getting more sophisticated, but the people installing the systems behind the walls were not keeping pace. Our first customers were banks and ministries that needed structured cabling done properly, the first time.
about.storyP2: Twenty-five years later, the brief is the same. The buildings are taller, the systems are smarter, the protocols are different — but the value is still the same: engineering work that holds up under audit, integrates without finger-pointing, and gets supported when something goes wrong at 2 a.m.
about.missionBody: To engineer low-current and ICT systems that perform reliably long after handover — backed by documentation, supported by our own team, and designed to grow with our clients' needs.
about.visionBody: To be the Kingdom's most trusted systems integrator, recognised not just for technical excellence but for the integrity and discipline we bring to every project we touch.

values.engineeredBody: Every install starts with a design package — load calculations, cable schedules, single-line diagrams. We do not bolt parts together and hope.
values.ownedBody: We design it, we install it, we commission it, we maintain it. No subcontractor chain to point fingers down when something goes wrong.
values.documentedBody: Fluke certifications, as-built drawings, panel programs, and commissioning records — handed over before final payment, not after.

services.indexSubtitle: We engineer the low-voltage layer of your building — the cables, cameras, panels, and protocols that turn a structure into a system.
services.talkHeading: Specifying this for an upcoming project?
